summary: Implemented deterministic RNG domains for M1 authority randomness. Added ADR-009 documenting SFC32/FNV-1a domain seeding, canonical seed/domain semantics, versioned DTO compatibility expectations, and no-entropy constraints. Added protocol DTOs, sim-core pure integer RNG construction/draw/DTO replay APIs, golden/property/cross-worker-compatible tests, and an explicit architecture self-test assertion that Math.random is rejected in authoritative sim-core paths.

tests_run.result: Vitest passed 3 files / 21 tests including SIM-004 golden vector, domain isolation, DTO replay, bounded integer draws, property replay/isolation, and Worker-compatible RNG sequence tests. Node emitted a non-blocking MODULE_TYPELESS_PACKAGE_JSON warning for the .ts Worker fixture executed with --experimental-strip-types.
Node hash 61e0ba1c matched Worker-compatible hash 61e0ba1c; deterministic hello simulation matched for 30 days.
Architecture boundaries passed; self-test fixture produced 15 expected violations. The dedicated architecture-authority-randomness Vitest also verified self-test output includes Math.random coverage.
architecture:check passed; sim:determinism matched hash 61e0ba1c; root Vitest passed 5 files / 24 tests; web Vitest passed 1 file / 3 tests.
All workspace package typecheck scripts passed, including @monsoon/sim-core.
ESLint completed with no reported violations.
Prettier reported all matched files use configured code style.

decisions: Added ADR-009 because accepted ADR-003/ADR-004 did not specify PRNG algorithm, seed format, fork/domain semantics, or compatibility expectations.

Selected sfc32-fnv1a32-domain-v1 with FNV-1a 32-bit expansion into four SFC32 state words and integer-only bounded draws; no crypto RNG, real time, environment entropy, external service, floating-point draw API, or new production dependency was introduced.
Protocol owns the versioned serializable DTO constants/types; sim-core owns validation, canonical domain construction, stream stepping, and DTO replay.
Domain keys are explicit system/day/entity/purpose/substream records. Streams are constructed from seed plus full domain key, so unrelated random calls in one domain do not perturb another.
The static guard already rejected Math.random in authoritative sim-core; SIM-004 strengthened the self-test output and added a Vitest assertion for that coverage.
risks: R3 task: RNG algorithm/canonicalization changes are compatibility-sensitive and should be independently checked by qa_reviewer.

The Worker-compatible RNG test uses a Node worker_threads fixture with --experimental-strip-types, matching the repository's current M0/M1 Worker-compatible testing level rather than a real browser Dedicated Worker bootstrap.

Repository still contains pre-existing/coordinator metadata changes under project/goal-mode-state.json, project/model-routing-state.json, project/tasks/*, and project/messages/routes/* that were not part of the SIM-004 implementation artifacts.
requested_action: Perform independent QA review for SIM-004, including ADR-009 compatibility semantics, deterministic RNG domain isolation/replay, DTO serialization readiness for SIM-005, cross-environment test sufficiency, and Math.random authority guard coverage. Do not mark SIM-004 ACCEPTED/CLOSED without reviewer approval.
